title: tabernaemontana linkii
intro: Tabernaemontana linkii, also known as the yellow tabernaemontana or yellow chandelier vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana linkii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Tabernaemontana linkii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
